stemHtml: An IFR flight in IMC conditions is being radar vectored when the aircraft experiences radio communication failure. Taking into consideration the applicable minimum flight altitude, the PIC should…

options.a: proceed in the most direct manner possible to rejoin the flight plan route no later than the next significant point.
options.b: maintain the last assigned heading for a period of 10 minutes, and then adjust in accordance with the flight plan.
options.c: maintain the last assigned heading for a period of 15 minutes, and then adjust in accordance with the flight plan.
options.d: climb to the Minimum Sector Altitude and hold for a period of 5 minutes, and then rejoin the flight plan route.
